title: Google Releases Three New Models: Gemini 3.6 Flash, Flagship 3.5 Pro Delayed
excerpt: Google DeepMind officially launched three new AI models, Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber on July 21, significantly enhancing the efficienc
content_html:
Google DeepMind officially launched three new AI models, Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber on July 21, significantly enhancing the efficiency and practical application capabilities of medium and lightweight models.

As the core of this update, the main model Gemini 3.6 Flash has achieved significant improvements in code writing, knowledge understanding, and multimodal capabilities, while reducing token usage by up to 17%, further lowering the cost of calls. Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite is designed to provide a highly cost-effective lightweight experience; while 3.5 Flash Cyber serves as a specialized model for cybersecurity, being made available in a limited access pilot form to government agencies and trusted partners for vulnerability identification and repair.

Google stated that this release aims to provide enterprise customers building large-scale AI Agents with high-reliability, low-latency infrastructure support.

Notably, the long-anticipated flagship model Gemini 3.5 Pro was not included in this update. Since its update in February, it has faced internal performance challenges, leading to a delayed release. It is currently in the partner phase testing stage, and the official team has stated they aim to launch it as soon as possible.

Facing intense competition from OpenAI's GPT-5.5/5.6 and Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 and Sonnet 5, Google is addressing computing power and efficiency challenges through hardware and software collaboration. It has been reported that the company is developing an efficient server chip internally with the code name "Frozen v2," and has already launched the largest Gemini 4 front-end pre-training to date, demonstrating continuous investment in AI infrastructure and next-generation large models.

sentences.zh: 面对OpenAI的GPT-5.5/5.6和Anthropic的Claude Opus 4.8和Sonnet 5的激烈竞争，谷歌正在通过硬件和软件协作来解决计算能力和效率的挑战。

sentences.zh: 据悉，该公司正在内部开发代号“Frozen v2”的高效服务器芯片，并已推出迄今为止最大规模的Gemini 4前端预训练，展现了对AI基础设施和下一代大模型的持续投入。

content_html_zh:
7月21日，谷歌DeepMind正式推出Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite、3.5 Flash Cyber​​三款全新AI模型，显着提升中轻量级模型的效率和实际应用能力。

作为本次更新的核心，主力型号Gemini 3.6 Flash在代码编写、知识理解、多模态能力等方面实现了显着提升，同时减少了高达17%的代币使用量，进一步降低了调用成本。 Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite旨在提供高性价比的轻量化体验； 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 作为网络安全的专门模型，以有限访问试点形式向政府机构和值得信赖的合作伙伴提供漏洞识别和修复。

谷歌表示，该版本旨在为构建大规模AI Agent的企业客户提供高可靠、低延迟的基础设施支持。

值得注意的是，备受期待的旗舰机型Gemini 3.5 Pro并未包含在本次更新中。 自二月份更新以来，它面临着内部性能挑战，导致发布延迟。 目前正处于合作伙伴阶段测试阶段，官方团队表示将尽快上线。

面对OpenAI的GPT-5.5/5.6和Anthropic的Claude Opus 4.8和Sonnet 5的激烈竞争，谷歌正在通过硬件和软件协作来解决计算能力和效率的挑战。 据悉，该公司正在内部开发代号“Frozen v2”的高效服务器芯片，并已推出迄今为止最大规模的Gemini 4前端预训练，展现了对AI基础设施和下一代大模型的持续投入。
